titlestmt.titleproper: Johnson Graduate School of Management. Student Activities Office records26-8-3199

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-05-17 18:21:04 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Johnson Graduate School of Management. Student Activities Office records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Johnson Graduate School of Management (Cornell University). Student Activities Office

did.physdesc: Records, resumes, reports, memoranda, job descriptions and applications, articles, correspondence, notes, calendars, brochures, slides, videocassettes.
did.abstract: Student files, correspondence and videos for the Masters in Business Administration (MBA) Program.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Student files, correspondence and videos for the Masters in Business Administration Program, including information on those who participated in the Russian and Japanese exchange and graduate fellowship programs.

emph.ref: Series III. Edmund S. Muskie and Freedom Support Act Graduate Fellowship Program
Series IV. Central and Eastern Europe Development Program

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Johnson Graduate School of Management Student Activities Office records, #26-8-3199. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
